mandatory.title: Empty Shelves
mandatory.body: The cabinets are bare. Those sharing the space look at one another with calculating eyes.

choices.label: Ensure survival at one person's expense
Let the shortage run its course

mandatory.title: Door Knock
mandatory.body: Boots cross the threshold before anyone remembers to lock the door.

mandatory.title: Too Much in One Place
mandatory.body: Accumulation has its own gravity. People notice what they are not meant to see.

choices.label: Spread it thin before envy organizes
Let them imagine what they cannot have
Move the excess somewhere less obvious

mandatory.title: Empty Eyes
mandatory.body: Hungry eyes watch the last crumbs vanish.

choices.label: Whisper names and make a list

mandatory.title: Ravenous Crowd
mandatory.body: Desperate hands reach for anything edible, and voices rise in anger.

choices.label: Promise deliveries that do not exist
Let them take what is left

mandatory.title: Silent Decision
mandatory.body: The strongest look at the weakest and agree without words.

choices.label: Draw lots to decide who goes

mandatory.title: Spotlight
mandatory.body: Eyes you cannot see now turn toward you.

choices.label: Pay the host to change the subject
Offer a scapegoat to the cameras

mandatory.title: Data Breach
mandatory.body: Your accounts show transactions they should not show.

choices.label: Hire outsider to bury it completely

mandatory.title: Deepfakes
mandatory.body: Footage of your gatherings circulates with altered voices.

choices.label: Offer up a follower to take blame
Ignore and hope the story dies

mandatory.title: Eye on the Horizon
mandatory.body: A shape at the edge of the sky urges you to look, promising answers you cannot unsee.

mandatory.title: Schism
mandatory.body: Disagreements fracture the group as different forces whisper promises.

choices.label: Let them fight and hope the strong remain
Swear fealty to a particular force

mandatory.title: Buzzing Decay
mandatory.body: An infestation begins that seems to answer someone's call.

choices.label: Feed the swarm to redirect it
Let the swarm into the city

events.title: Day Work
events.body: Keeping a low profile means blending in. There is always work for someone willing not to ask questions.

choices.label: Work the longer route, risk the extra hours

events.title: Gray Market
events.body: A contact with nervous hands offers goods from an estate that closed without a will.

choices.label: Pass on the opportunity this time
Buy the lot without asking about origin

events.title: Coded Words
events.body: The right sentence, spoken in the right place, lodges itself in a stranger's thoughts for days.

choices.label: Speak obliquely at the edge of a crowd
Leave coded notes with the right people

events.title: The Back Room
events.body: Someone below the floor promises anything to see daylight again.

choices.label: Leave them — let the noise be their problem

events.title: Something Old
events.body: Behind old plaster, a hand of blackened silver waits with fingers curled inward.

choices.label: Mark the spot and come back later

events.title: The Pattern
events.body: The same geometry appears in sleep, in shadows, in cracks along the ceiling. It is asking to be completed.

events.title: Night Work
events.body: The work continues after everyone else has gone to bed. Every step demands something real.

choices.label: Pay what the next step requires
Push through using effort instead of care
Trust chance to carry this step

events.title: Paper Trail
events.body: The accounts have begun to read like a confession. Numbers that should not line up are lining up.

choices.label: Destroy everything and work from memory
Pay someone to make it disappear entirely

events.title: Long Tongue
events.body: A neighbor has been saying things. Not accusations yet — just observations with a particular shape.

choices.label: Introduce a more interesting story nearby

events.title: Second Visit
events.body: They come with names this time. One of the names sounds like something they read off a wall.

choices.label: Use the object to vanish completely
Let the most exposed ones confess

events.title: Documented
events.body: It has moved from spoken to written. Someone filed it somewhere official.

choices.label: Intervene at the source with money and an object
Lean into the attention as cover
Pay everyone involved to misplace the file

events.title: Wrong Shape
events.body: The work has bent in a direction it should not go. What responds is not what was called.

choices.label: Correct the shape and restart the step
Push through it with the object
Accept this step as lost and recalibrate

events.title: Forage Run
events.body: The streets hold scraps if you know where to look.

choices.label: Send a pair of quiet hands

events.title: Leaking Soup
events.body: An old soup kitchen is rumoured to serve more than broth.

events.title: Tin for a Price
events.body: Canned goods change hands under low lights.

events.title: Whispered Fever
events.body: Someone mentions a sickness that begins with emptiness.

events.title: Fever Records
events.body: The whispers have become written notices of quarantine.

events.title: Empty Cellar
events.body: A padlocked door leads to a space that might hide a survivor.

events.title: Hidden Idol
events.body: Beneath a charred stew pot lies something cold and ancient.

choices.label: Mark the spot and come back later

events.title: Scarred Accounts
events.body: Your scribbles about food distribution resemble a confession.

events.title: Bone Lottery
events.body: A group proposes a lottery where the loser feeds the group.

events.title: Hunger Pattern
events.body: In the dark, lines of hunger draw themselves across walls and dreams.

choices.label: Dismiss the pattern as hunger hallucinations
Trace the lines with trembling fingers

events.title: Night Cauldron
events.body: The pot simmers with nothing but hope. Every hand must give something real.

choices.label: Add the required morsels as the pattern dictates
Water down the brew to make it last
Pray for a miracle instead of following the recipe

events.title: Gnawed Bones
events.body: The pattern twists, demanding far more than is left to give.

choices.label: Correct the pattern with precious supplies
Abandon this step to stave off collapse

events.title: Whisper Campaign
events.body: A story about you is spreading, told by unseen mouths.

events.title: Viral Clip
events.body: A clip of your ritual goes viral without context.

events.title: Sponsored Ad
events.body: A local business offers sponsorship if you promote them.

events.title: Data Mining
events.body: Someone offers to sell you data on those watching.

events.title: Pirated Feed
events.body: An unmarked drive arrives with a live feed from somewhere unreachable.

events.title: Echo Chamber
events.body: Your message only reaches those already listening.

events.title: Algorithmic Trap
events.body: The platform's rules change against you.

choices.label: Lean into extremity to attract eyes

events.title: Screenless Day
events.body: A day without screens is declared by someone powerful.

choices.label: Use the break to rally offline
Sabotage the event to keep eyes on you

events.title: Smoke and Mirrors
events.body: Illusions and flashy tricks promise to distract the watchers.

events.title: Screen Static
events.body: Screens flicker with patterns that seem to know you.

events.title: Signal Work
events.body: The pattern pulses with demands for funding and attention.

events.title: Feedback Loop
events.body: The images repeat and distort, changing watchers.

events.title: Crawling Fog
events.body: A pale fog licks at the streets and leaves behind spirals on skin.

events.title: Blood Moon
events.body: The moon turns a deep red, causing tempers to fray and whispers to grow.

choices.label: Hold a night watch and pray
Harvest the mood for a ceremony
Invoke old names under its light

events.title: Relic Auction
events.body: A secret auction offers items older than memory.

events.title: Chaos Parade
events.body: A procession for some god you do not recognize goes past your door.

events.title: Endless Procession
events.body: The procession never ends and chants a name you cannot pronounce.

choices.label: Step into the rhythm and recruit

events.title: Strange Growths
events.body: Food left in the corner develops eyes overnight.

events.title: Plague of Flies
events.body: Swarms of flies descend on your stores and on your followers.

choices.label: Burn the supplies to stop it
Send them into your rivals' larder

events.title: Wild Offering
events.body: An animal wanders in, seemingly waiting for judgment.

events.title: Shifting Wager
events.body: A cloaked stranger offers to teach you a game that rewrites itself.

events.title: Watching Wall
events.body: Behind crumbling plaster, concentric circles stare back.

choices.label: Dig until the eye is free

events.title: Gazing Work
events.body: The eye demands offerings and new patterns within patterns.

choices.label: Offer additional relics to hasten the gaze

events.title: Shattered Circles
events.body: The pattern fractures, releasing things with too many limbs.
